channel.title: quick sort on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in quick sort on changcui

item.title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
item.description: // 思路一：使用 priority_queue 保存最大的 k 的元素 class Solution { public: int findKthLargest(vector<int>& nums, int k) { priority_queue<int, vector<int>, greater<int>> q; for (auto i : nums) { if (q.size() < k) q.push(i); else if (i > q.top()) { q.push(i); q.pop(); } } return q.top(); } }; // Runtime: 16 ms, faster than 43.19% of C++ online submissions for Kth Largest Element in an Array. // Memory Usage: 7 MB, less than 100.
